Module org.kink_lang.kink

Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec

package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
Internal representation of vec vals.
  • Class
    Description
    MaybeTrait
    Trait or an error.
    TraitError
    Error that the vec cannot be treated as a trait.
    TraitError.ArityNotEven
    The arity is not even, so the vec cannot be a trait.
    TraitError.SymNotStr
    The elem specified by the index is not a str.
    TraitVecInternal
    Immutable vec internal for elements like ['A' a 'B' b 'C' c].
    VecInternal
    Container of vec elements.
